entities.legal_role: Party obligated to pay the Guarantee Payment to Customer if Annual Deficits are positive.
entities.evidence_quote: SunPower shall pay to Customer an amount equal to the cumulative product of (i) the Annual Deficits and (ii) the Reimbursement Rate per kWh

entities.name: Customer
entities.legal_role: Party entitled to receive the Guarantee Payment from SunPower upon invoice.
entities.evidence_quote: Customer shall, by invoice, promptly notify SunPower of any Guarantee Payment due

entities.name: Annual Deficits
entities.legal_role: Condition that triggers SunPower's obligation to pay the Guarantee Payment if the sum is greater than zero.
entities.evidence_quote: if the ∑ Annual Deficits > 0

entities.name: Reimbursement Rate per kWh
entities.legal_role: Rate used to calculate the amount of the Guarantee Payment payable by SunPower.
entities.evidence_quote: the cumulative product of (i) the Annual Deficits and (ii) the Reimbursement Rate per kWh

entities.name: Guarantee Payment
entities.legal_role: Monetary amount SunPower must pay to Customer when Annual Deficits are positive, calculated by multiplying Annual Deficits by Reimbursement Rate.
entities.evidence_quote: a “Guarantee Payment”

entities.name: Invoice from Customer to SunPower
entities.legal_role: Formal notification by Customer to SunPower of the Guarantee Payment amount due, triggering payment obligation.
entities.evidence_quote: Customer shall, by invoice, promptly notify SunPower of any Guarantee Payment due

relationships.legal_significance: SunPower is legally required to pay the Guarantee Payment to Customer when Annual Deficits are positive.
relationships.evidence_quote: SunPower shall pay to Customer an amount equal to the cumulative product of (i) the Annual Deficits and (ii) the Reimbursement Rate per kWh

relationships.legal_significance: Positive Annual Deficits activate SunPower's obligation to pay the Guarantee Payment.
relationships.evidence_quote: if the ∑ Annual Deficits > 0, then SunPower shall pay

relationships.legal_significance: The Reimbursement Rate is a factor in calculating the Guarantee Payment amount.
relationships.evidence_quote: the cumulative product of (i) the Annual Deficits and (ii) the Reimbursement Rate per kWh

relationships.legal_significance: Annual Deficits are a factor in calculating the Guarantee Payment amount.
relationships.evidence_quote: the cumulative product of (i) the Annual Deficits and (ii) the Reimbursement Rate per kWh

relationships.legal_significance: Customer must notify SunPower by invoice of the Guarantee Payment due, triggering the payment timeline.
relationships.evidence_quote: Customer shall, by invoice, promptly notify SunPower of any Guarantee Payment due

relationships.legal_significance: SunPower must pay the Guarantee Payment within 30 days after receiving the invoice from Customer.
relationships.evidence_quote: A Guarantee Payment shall be payable within thirty (30) days of the date of such invoice

extractor_notes: The clause establishes a conditional payment obligation from SunPower to Customer triggered by positive Annual Deficits, calculated by multiplying Annual Deficits by a Reimbursement Rate. Customer must notify SunPower by invoice to trigger payment, which is due within 30 days of invoice date.

source_clause_title: 3.2 In the event that any EPC Contractor -procured equipment and materials are found to be damaged or

entities.name: EPC Contractor
entities.legal_role: Party responsible for replacing defective materials and bearing related costs.
entities.evidence_quote: EPC Contractor shall be solely responsible for the replacement thereof

entities.name: Defective Materials
entities.legal_role: Materials found to be damaged and subject to replacement obligation.
entities.evidence_quote: defective (“Defective Materials”)

entities.name: Replacement Materials
entities.legal_role: Materials procured to replace the defective materials.
entities.evidence_quote: procurement of replacement equipment and materials (“Replacement Materials”)

entities.name: Site
entities.legal_role: Location where defective materials are removed and replacement materials installed.
entities.evidence_quote: removal of Defective Materials from the Site

entities.name: special equipment or additional labor
entities.legal_role: Additional resources that may be required to deliver replacement materials, costs borne by EPC Contractor.
entities.evidence_quote: any special equipment or additional labor is required to deliver the Replacement Materials

relationships.legal_significance: EPC Contractor has the obligation to replace defective materials found.
relationships.evidence_quote: EPC Contractor shall be solely responsible for the replacement thereof

relationships.legal_significance: EPC Contractor must procure replacement equipment and materials for defective ones.
relationships.evidence_quote: procurement of replacement equipment and materials (“Replacement Materials”)

relationships.legal_significance: EPC Contractor is responsible for removing defective materials from the Site.
relationships.evidence_quote: removal of Defective Materials from the Site

relationships.legal_significance: EPC Contractor must deliver replacement materials to the installation point on the Site.
relationships.evidence_quote: delivery of the Replacement Materials to the point of installation on the Site

relationships.legal_significance: EPC Contractor bears all additional costs for special equipment or labor needed to deliver replacement materials.
relationships.evidence_quote: EPC Contractor shall be responsible for payment of all additional costs relating to such special equipment and additional labor

extractor_notes: The clause imposes a comprehensive replacement and cost-bearing obligation on EPC Contractor for defective materials, including removal, procurement, delivery, and any additional special equipment or labor costs.
